name: Spotify

extraction.notes: Custom Sparkle-style XML. Version is an attribute 'version' on the first <item> element, e.g. '1.2.49.g12345678'. Separate feeds per architecture: osx-arm64 and osx-x86_64. 403 Cloudflare block without proper User-Agent.

release_date.notes: pubDate present in the XML feed items (if populated).

notes: Custom Sparkle-style XML feed (not standard Sparkle namespace). Separate version-check feeds per architecture, but download DMG is universal and always latest. Requires proper User-Agent to avoid Cloudflare 403. macOS 11 or later.
